body_txt: The ability to remove one's eye (real or false, magical or mechanical) and use it to view hard-to-see areas during certain situations after placing it somewhere. The eye is not in any way connected to the owner, yet it operates just as well as it was. Apart from the creepiness value, it can also work as a Surveillance Drone . Compare Detachment Combat , Helping Hands , Losing Your Head . A Sub-Trope of Faceless Eye . Can be used for Sinister Surveillance . For using eyes not one's own, see Seeing Through Another's Eyes and Animal Eye Spy .
